title: Tadka Greek Yogurt Crumble
description: A delicious and crowd-pleasing keto-friendly dessert featuring sweetened condensed milk, tadka spices, and Greek yogurt.

ingredients.name: Sweetened Condensed Milk
ingredients.notes: Use a low-calorie sweetener if needed

instructions: In a bowl, mix Greek yogurt with sweetened condensed milk. Add all-purpose flour and ground cumin; stir well.
Mix in salt to taste. Fold in chopped fresh herbs if using.
Preheat oven to 170°C (325°F). Grease an 8x8 inch baking dish.
Heat a tablespoon of ghee or clarified butter in a small pan over medium heat. Add tadka spices and mix well until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Pour the yogurt mixture into the prepared baking dish. Spread evenly with spatula.
Place the ghee-filled pan on top of the oven. Pour any remaining ghee evenly on top of the crumble batter.
Bake for 25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy around edges.
Cool slightly before serving. Serve warm as a dessert.
